warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
5 Hindu Push Ups
10m bear Crawls
10 x Inch Worms
10 Cossack Squats

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
AMRAP x 10 mins
6m Handstand Walk OR 2 Wall Walks
12 Dumbbell Snatches 22.5/15
10 Pistols

gymnastics:
EMOM x 4
12 Hollow Rocks
EMOM x 5 mins
5 Box Pistols (slow and controlled)
EMOM x 5
5 Eccentric Lower
Two Leg stand Up
EMOM x 5
Counterbalance Pistols - Small Plate
EMOM X 3 20s handstand hold
EMOM X 3 180 deg. Conan Walk (on box) x 2
EMOM X 3 5-10 Shoulder taps (or wall walk)
EMOM X 5 Tripod Handstand Hold
EMOM X 5 Spotted  Freestanding Handstand Hold
EMOM X 5 Spotted handstand walk with PVC

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today emphasizes shoulders, quads, and core via gymnastics and snatches; posterior chain work balances and aids recovery.
